scripts.api: pnpm --filter @metabolizm/shared build && pnpm --filter @metabolizm/db build && pnpm --filter api start:dev
scripts.admin: pnpm --filter @metabolizm/shared build && pnpm --filter @metabolizm/db build && pnpm --filter admin dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @metabolizm/shared build && pnpm --filter @metabolizm/db build && pnpm -r typecheck
